title: Mountain Climbing 爬山
scene: 一家人去爬山，在半山腰休息聊天。

lines.en: Dad, I'm so tired! Can we take a rest?
lines.zh: 爸爸，我好累！我们能休息一下吗？

lines.en: Sure! Let's sit on this rock. We've been climbing for an hour.
lines.zh: 当然！我们坐在这块石头上。我们已经爬了一个小时了。

lines.en: Have some water, Leo. And eat a banana for energy.
lines.zh: 喝点水，里奥。再吃根香蕉补充能量。

lines.en: Thanks, Mom! How much further to the top?
lines.zh: 谢谢妈妈！离山顶还有多远？

lines.en: About thirty more minutes. The view from the top is worth it.
lines.zh: 大概还有三十分钟。从山顶看的风景是值得的。

lines.en: Look! I can see the whole city from here! It's amazing!
lines.zh: 看！从这里我能看到整个城市！太神奇了！

lines.en: Yes, the higher you climb, the better the view gets.
lines.zh: 是的，越往上爬，风景越好。

lines.en: I feel much better now. Let's keep going! I want to reach the top!
lines.zh: 我现在感觉好多了。我们继续吧！我想到达山顶！

lines.en: That's the spirit! But remember, slow and steady wins the race.
lines.zh: 就该这样！但记住，稳扎稳打才能赢。

lines.en: Let's go! We'll have lunch at the top. I brought sandwiches!
lines.zh: 出发！我们在山顶吃午饭。我带了三明治！
